Bus Timings

X2 Bus Schedule Satwa Bus Station to Union Square Bus Station

January 19, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus X2 offers a vital connection between Satwa and Union Square Bus Station, providing an efficient transit option for travelers and commuters. Operating with frequent service throughout the day, Bus X2 ensures accessibility to key locations and major transit hubs.

Route Name X2
Route Description Satwa Bus Station · 11 - Union Square Bus Station · 5
Total Distance Approximately 15 to 22.5 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 45 minutes
Operational Hours 05:59 to 19:55 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Bus X2 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

From Satwa Bus Station From Union Square Bus Station
05:59 06:03
06:20 06:25
06:35 06:50
06:50 07:15
07:05 07:30

08:47 09:10
09:10 09:30

19:10 19:05
19:25 19:30
19:40 19:50
19:55  

Bus X2 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website, or simply follow this link for X2 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus X2 is AED 3, offering a cost-effective option for traveling across the entire route. This price provides a budget-friendly way to navigate between Satwa and Union Square Bus Station while ensuring a reliable and comfortable journey. With this affordable fare, passengers can enjoy seamless connections to key areas of Dubai without breaking the bank.

Bus Booking

While Bus X2 does not offer online booking, passengers can easily board the bus at any of its designated stops. For real-time updates and scheduling information, passengers can utilize the RTA Dubai app or visit the official RTA website. The app provides live bus timings, route details, and other essential travel information, ensuring a seamless transit experience.

Bus Route

The Bus X2 route connects two major transport nodes:

  1. Satwa Bus Station · 11

  2. Satwa, Masjid

  3. Hana Center

  4. Standard Chartered Bank

  5. Sharaf DG Metro · 1

  6. Al Ghubaiba Metro

  7. Khaleej Road

  8. Naif, Intersection

  9. Burj Nahar, Intersection

  10. Union Square Bus Station · 5

Bus X2 Station Overview

Satwa Bus Station · 11

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Satwa Bus Station · 11 is a major transit point located in the bustling Satwa neighborhood of Dubai. This station is well-frequented by commuters and residents due to its strategic location near local shops, markets, and residential areas.

It is equipped with modern amenities including sheltered waiting areas, ticketing services, and real-time bus schedule updates. The station’s central position in Satwa makes it a key hub for those traveling within the neighborhood or transferring to other routes, ensuring efficient connectivity throughout the area.

Intersection of Bus Routes at Burj Nahar Intersection

This central location offers seamless connections between these diverse routes, making it a crucial point for passengers traveling throughout Dubai. The stop is well-equipped with essential amenities and real-time schedule updates, providing a convenient

Union Square Bus Station · 5

Union Square Bus Station · 5 serves as a significant transit hub located in the heart of Dubai’s Union Square area.

Its central location near major commercial and administrative districts makes it a crucial point for commuters and travelers navigating the city.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus X2 in Dubai travels through several key areas with notable tourist attractions and destinations. Here’s a look at some highlights along the route: 1.

  1. Hana Center: A bustling shopping and dining complex, Hana Center offers a range of retail stores, restaurants, and entertainment options.

  2. Standard Chartered Bank: This stop is close to several commercial buildings and offices, making it a key business district.

  3. Sharaf DG Metro · 1: The Sharaf DG Metro Station connects to the Dubai Metro network, providing access to various attractions across the city. Nearby, you can explore Al Karama, known for its vibrant markets and shops.

  4. Al Ghubaiba Metro: Al Ghubaiba is home to Dubai Museum and the Al Fahidi Historical Neighborhood, offering a glimpse into Dubai’s rich heritage.

  5. Khaleej Road: This area is a major thoroughfare, providing access to numerous restaurants, shops, and commercial establishments.

  6. Naif, Intersection: The Naif Souq is a traditional market where you can experience local culture and shop for a variety of goods, from textiles to spices.

  7. Burj Nahar, Intersection: Burj Nahar is a historic watchtower and a cultural landmark, providing insight into Dubai’s history.

9.

Overall, Bus X2 covers areas rich in cultural, historical, and commercial significance, making it a valuable route for both tourists and residents exploring Dubai.

Journey Experience

A journey on the X2 bus from Satwa Bus Station to Union Square Bus Station offers a fascinating ride through the vibrant heart of Dubai.

As the route progresses, passengers can glimpse iconic landmarks such as the Dubai Frame and Al Fahidi Historical District, which showcase the blend of old and new in the city. This route provides an engaging view of Dubai’s dynamic urban life, combining historic charm with modern development.

Travelling with Careem

The fare for this journey ranges from AED 40 to AED 48, offering a convenient and affordable way to reach one of Dubai’s central transportation hubs. Whether you’re exploring the city’s vibrant markets, shopping at Deira City Centre, or simply commuting, the Careem app ensures a smooth and efficient travel experience.

This comprehensive guide to Bus X2 covers all essential aspects of the service, from detailed route information and timings to ticket pricing and booking options. Whether you’re commuting for work or exploring the city, Bus X2 offers a convenient and cost-effective way to travel across key areas in Dubai. By understanding the route and schedule, you can plan your journey effectively and enjoy a smooth travel experience.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
